forecast-period.text: Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely this evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 24.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower this evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming north to northeasterly and light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower late this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Coober Pedy in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 22.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
